enum_values.name: ALL_SELECTED
enum_values.summary: Selects all user selected objects from the model.

enum_values.name: ALL_OBJECTS
enum_values.summary: Selects all objects from the model.

enum_values.name: MODELOBJECT_CHILDREN
enum_values.summary: Selects children of specified type of given ModelObject

enum_values.name: BY_FILTER_NAME
enum_values.summary: Selects all the ModelObjects for a given filter name

enum_values.name: CONNECTED_COMPONENTS
enum_values.summary: Selects all connected components of given ModelObject

enum_values.name: BY_BOUNDING_BOX
enum_values.summary: Selects all objects intersecting with given bounding box

enum_values.name: ALL_OBJECTS_WITH_TYPE
enum_values.summary: All Objects with type given in type in the "subtype".

enum_values.name: REFERENCE_MODEL_OBJECTS
enum_values.summary: Selects sub objects of given ReferenceModel.

enum_values.name: MODELOBJECT_FATHERS
enum_values.summary: Selects fathers of specified type of given ModelObject (Tasks mainly)

enum_values.name: CONNECTED_DEPENDENCIES
enum_values.summary: Selects all connected dependencies of given ModelObject (Tasks mainly)

enum_values.name: TASKS_OF_SELECTED_OBJECTS
enum_values.summary: Selects all tasks of selected objects

enum_values.name: MODIFIED_OBJECTS_AFTER_STAMP
enum_values.summary: Selects all modified and created objects

enum_values.name: FILTERED_OBJECTS_WITH_TYPE
enum_values.summary: Filtered objects with type given in type in the "subtype".

enum_values.name: DELETED_OBJECTS_AFTER_STAMP
enum_values.summary: Selects all modified objects

enum_values.name: ALL_PRESELECTED
enum_values.summary: Selects all preselected objects.

enum_values.name: BY_BOUNDING_BOX_AND_VIEW
enum_values.summary: Selects all objects that intersect with the given bounding box and that are visible in the given view.

enum_values.name: CONVERTED_FROM_REFERENCE_MODEL
enum_values.summary: Selects objects that were converted from a given reference model (if they weren't unlinked)

enum_values.name: ATTRIBUTE_MODIFIED_OBJECTS_AFTER_STAMP
enum_values.summary: Selects all objects of which attributes (UDA) have been modified after the stamp.

enum_values.name: NUMBERING_MODIFIED_OBJECTS_AFTER_STAMP
enum_values.summary: Selects all objects of which numbering has been modified after the stamp.

enum_values.name: CREATED_OBJECTS_AFTER_STAMP
enum_values.summary: Selects all created objects

enum_values.name: MODIFIED_OBJECTS_BY_FILTER_NAME
enum_values.summary: Selects all objects which are new, modified, numbered or which phase has changed after the stamp and pass the filter of given name.

enum_values.name: PHASE_MODIFIED_OBJECTS_AFTER_STAMP
enum_values.summary: Selects all objects of which phase has been modified after the stamp.

enum_values.name: OBJECTS_WITH_ANY_MODIFICATION_AFTER_STAMP
enum_values.summary: Selects all objects with any type of modification or are created after the stamp.

enum_values.name: BY_MODEL_OBJECT_TYPE
enum_values.summary: Selects all model objects with the specified type.
